# NESSIE Design System

This repository follows the **NESSIE** (NS Dutch Railways) design system.

Before generating or reviewing any UI, **read [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) in the repository root and follow it**. It routes you to the task playbooks (`skills/`) and the component, token, pattern, and accessibility reference docs (`reference/`).

Core rules: design **iOS-first**; use only documented NESSIE components and semantic/applied **tokens** — never raw hex or off-scale values; dark mode is automatic; supply accessible labels, contrast pairings, and structure. When the system lacks something, flag it as a gap rather than inventing a token or component.
